position_title_no: Quality Assurance Specialist (PMC, Supplier, Transport/Avionics Projects)
education:
Bachelor of Engineering, Electronics & Communication, Kuvempu University - Government, 1999 to 2003
PGD in MBA IBM, International Business Management, 2012 to 2013
detailed_tasks:
• Built and directed Quality teams with a broad range of expertise in Electronics/Electrical, Critical Hardware/Software systems, and Civil/Mechanical (Steel structures, Welding etc).
• Drove Organisational QHSE (Quality, Safety, Health & Environment) initiatives across Organisations, Consortiums, and Contractors.
• Led over 150 IMS audits, ensuring comprehensive QSHE compliance among 35+ contractors.
• Directed and implemented Corporate/Site QMS and standards specified by ISO 9000 and Contracts.
• Applied hands-on experience with tools such as 5 Why analysis, Fishbone diagrams, Pareto analysis, PFMEA/FMEA, etc.
• Managed Corporate IMS (Quality, Health, Safety, Environment), ISO Certification, Trainings, KPIs, Alert -Veto-Advise, Audits, and QC tools.
• Oversaw Engineering QA, including Gate reviews (Design to FAI), System Safety, SDLC/Agile/Scrum, Design/Coding Standards, and System Testing.
• Managed Supplier Quality, including Qualification, Action Closures, Monitoring Performance, and served as Lead Auditor for 100+ IMS Audits across 30 entities.
• Handled Site QAQC from Planning till Handover, including PQP, Material approvals/WMS/ITPs, IR/RFI, Problem Solving, Site NCRs, Snaglist, and RCAs.
• Supported Chief Quality role, managing Civil (+Mech) teams with experts and auditing 16+ Civil Contractors.
key_qualifications: PMP, Lead Auditor – ISO 9001, CMQ/OE (In progress), Lead Auditor IRCA/ISO 9001 (8 Yrs.), PMP (10 Yrs.), SSGB, QMS Foundation, ISO 14K/45K Certifications (Pursuing), Bid/Project Quality Assurance, Supplier Qualification, IPCA Airbus (Audit), People Management, AI tools, MS office, Excel Automation, SAP, EDMS (Mezzoteam), Testing & CM tools (DOORS/PIVS), Corp. IMS (Quality, Health, Safety, Environment), ISO Certification, Trainings, KPIs, Alert -Veto-Advise, Audits, QC tools, Engineering QA (Gate reviews, Design to FAI, System Safety, SDLC/Agile/Scrum, Design/Coding Standards, System Testing), Supplier Quality (Qualification, Action Closures, Monitoring Performance, Lead Auditor for 100+ IMS Audits across 30 entities), Site QAQC (Planning till Handover - PQP, Material approvals/WMS/ITPs, IR/RFI, Problem Solving, Site NCRs, Snaglist, RCAs), Civil (+Mech) Quality Management, 5 Why analysis, Fishbone diagrams, Pareto analysis, PFMEA/FMEA, Proactive, Self-starter, Effective communicator, Mentor, Quality as a Culture (First Time Right, Zero defects)

Approved QA/QC plans (+MS/ITP/Checklists) and QA/QC resources based on expertise review.

Implemented Site QA/QC plans through regular audits, site visits, reviews, RCAs, and related record management (KPIs/OBS/NCRs/Snag list).
Conducted Management reviews and Customer Site Visits, CMRS (System Safety) Visits, and followed up on actions to closure.
Reviewed the status of Contractors and Customer (QRM ppt); monitored KPIs, and ensured lessons learned were managed.
Supervised Lab activities, including contract issues, tracking testing performance, and invoices.
